creator: konrad.kreciwilk@korbank.pl
text:
I have DELL R630 with ccX (Chelsio T62100-SO-CR) agreggated with lagg0 and vlans on it. I move all vlans to JAIL (VNET). There works bird which received full feed (900k prefixes).

When I have set:

net.route.algo.inet.algo: dxr

the inbound dropp counter for ccX is incrementing. When I use dpdk_lpm4 or radix4 it do not happen.


graph for net.route.algo.inet.algo=radix4
https://imgur.com/a/LsKBioR

graph for net.route.algo.inet.algo=dxr
https://imgur.com/a/UNsrAk6
